name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Per-room per-day extras: unified items system replaces Stored Extras + booking-level items. DB v20.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.09: ICS export fix — cron refresh every 15min, proper booking save hooks. Git remote updated to lgf-bookings-plugin.
  • 1.9.2.08: Unified extras system — per-room per-day items; removed old Stored Extras section. DB v20.
